scenarios.name: Webinar Partner Outreach
scenarios.description: Outreach to organizations in Bryan's network to pitch a co-branded webinar partnership. These orgs have distribution to small-check investors (~$10K), climate tech founders, and operators. The webinar content will be a spin-off or truncated version of the Climate Tech Exit Lab.
scenarios.targetAudience: Organizations with climate tech / impact investor distribution
scenarios.trigger: Bryan identifies org as a fit — warm intro path

scenarios.name: Institutional Investor ABM — Canada
scenarios.description: Account-based marketing to Canadian impact foundations and institutional investors. Goal is to build warm relationships toward a sponsorship or LP conversation by end of summer 2026. These are high-stakes, relationship-first touches — not cold email blasts.
scenarios.targetAudience: Canadian impact foundations and institutional investors
scenarios.trigger: Bryan identifies target — or intro path unlocked via Equality Fund intermediary

scenarios.name: Sponsorship Platform Launch
scenarios.description: Building out a strong sponsorship ask and platform for BTC so we can have sponsorship conversations at the end of summer 2026. This includes developing the asset suite, the ask, and the outreach strategy.
scenarios.targetAudience: Corporate sponsors, foundations, and aligned organizations
scenarios.trigger: End of Q2 2026 — assets built, ask ready
